Service station. It has a small market. Hot water. Restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Un muy buen lugar, como para hacer una parada y relajarse un poco bajo la arboleda y un parque hermoso. Excelente atención del personal, y las instalaciones en impecable estado, un parador, con productos surtidos, como para que el viajero se provea lo necesario y hacer que el viaje sea aun mucho mas placentero.

(Translated by Google)
A very nice place to stop and relax under the trees and in a beautiful park. Excellent service from the staff, and the facilities are in impeccable condition. It's a roadside inn with a variety of products, perfect for travelers to stock up on supplies and make their trip even more enjoyable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURncEl6STZBRRAB
